items.title: GPT‑5.5 Instant
items.description:
• Better understands user intent
• Improved shopping and local recommendations
• Handles complex constraints across turns

items.title: Claude Tag
items.description:
• Works as a Slack teammate
• Async task delegation for teams
• Can monitor metrics and trigger actions

items.title: Siri AI
items.description:
• Personal context from messages, photos, email
• On‑screen awareness to act on screen content
• Integrated writing tools and app actions

items.title: Conductor
items.description:
• Build voice agents by typing plain English
• See every change in the flow before deployment
• Cuts build time by 2.5x with 70% test automation

items.title: Gemma 4
items.description:
• Open‑weight models on Amazon Bedrock
• Supports text & image, reasoning, function calls
• Choose size for cost, latency, or performance

items.title: Interactions API
items.description:
• Single call to run autonomous agents
• Add background execution and tool mixing
• Unified schema simplifies agent development

items.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash
items.description:
• Agents can browse web and control desktop apps
• Built‑in safety checks stop risky actions
• Boosts long‑run automation for businesses

items.title: Runway Agent 2.0
items.description:
• Creates ads, videos, and posts from a single chat
• Learns from your performance data to improve assets
• Generates formats for every platform automatically

items.title: Google Interactions API
items.description:
• One call launches a full‑stack AI agent in a sandbox
• Supports background runs and mixed tool calls
• Keeps state for long‑running, multi‑step tasks

items.title: Recursion RL Platform
items.description:
• Turn production runs into training data
• Real‑time evaluation of enterprise workflows
• Continuous model improvement on live tasks

items.title: Kaarvi Living Data
items.description:
• Conversational analytics without SQL
• No‑code pipelines that auto‑generate code
• Dashboards auto‑refresh via Live Sync

items.title: MiniMax M2.7
items.description:
• Self‑evolving model builds its own harness
• Handles full project delivery and bug fixes
• Maintains 97% skill adherence across 40+ tools

items.title: Updoc Clinical AI
items.description:
• FDA-cleared AI agents for real-time care
• Integrates directly with EHR systems
• Automates meds, labs, and care coordination

items.title: Proof X401 Protocol
items.description:
• Verifies who authorizes AI agent actions
• Works with payments, identity, and intent APIs
• Open, issuer-neutral spec with live demos

items.title: Newton Agents
items.description:
• Physical AI agents detect equipment faults
• Analyze sensor data, video, and context instantly
• Deployable on cloud, edge, or on-premise

items.title: Openthinkeragent-32B
items.description:
• Open-source 32b coding agent
• 26% pass on terminal bench
• All data and weights released

items.title: Self-Harness
items.description:
• Agents rewrite their own scaffolding
• Boosts terminal-bench 2.0 by 21.4 pts
• No model weight changes needed

items.title: Sakana Fugu Ultra
items.description:
• 1m-token context window
• Matches top anthropic models on benchmarks
• Multi-model orchestration via single API
